response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned staff-level engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, broad full-stack experience, and recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, which aligns with the role's key technologies. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the resume shows only recent, partial GenAI exposure with no demonstrated experience in RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks. Customer-facing technical leadership is suggested through workshops and teaching but not proven in enterprise discovery or delivery settings.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and AI-agent/developer tooling infrastructure
Deep TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Strong engineering-excellence track record (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, open-source projects)
concerns: Falls well short of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI experience appears limited to the current role
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, data pipeline, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical discovery or cloud architecture leadership (AWS exposure appears shallow)

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and evaluation pipeline expertise
